# Vendored JavaScript

This app intentionally avoids an npm/package-manager surface for frontend code.

## chartjs-plugin-datalabels.js

- Package: `chartjs-plugin-datalabels`
- Version: `2.2.0`
- Source: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chartjs-plugin-datalabels@2.2.0/dist/chartjs-plugin-datalabels.js`
- SHA-256: `5d3587eb9dbc0f1a98fd30535c6a91acc8bd82ad7d2cb3a45d7a9a66c2581078`
- Purpose: Adds visible point labels to Chartkick/Chart.js product price history charts without adding `package.json`, npm install scripts, or transitive npm dependencies.
